requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (TZS / IEC CISPR 14 under TBS conformity)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（TBS符合性下的TZS/IEC CISPR 14）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（TBS符合性下的TZS/IEC CISPR 14）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances entering Tanzania are expected to meet the electromagnetic-compatibility standard adopted by the Tanzania Bureau of Standards (TBS) as a Tanzania Standard (TZS) adopting the IEC/CISPR 14 series — CISPR 14-1 (emission) and CISPR 14-2 (immunity) for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus. EMC conformity is verified together with electrical safety under the TBS mandatory programme, and for imports through the Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) Certificate of Conformity for each regulated consignment. Where an appliance incorporates radio functionality (for example Wi-Fi or Bluetooth for smart-home features), type approval from the Tanzania Communications Regulatory Authority (TCRA) is additionally required for the radio module. CISPR 14-1 covers conducted and radiated disturbance limits relevant to compressor motors and the switching electronics of modern inverter-driven compressors.
summary.zh: 进入坦桑尼亚的家用制冷器具须符合坦桑尼亚标准局（TBS）采用的电磁兼容标准，即采用IEC/CISPR 14系列的坦桑尼亚标准（TZS）——适用于家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的CISPR 14-1（发射）和CISPR 14-2（抗扰度）。电磁兼容符合性与电气安全一并在TBS强制计划下验证，对进口货物则通过每批受管制货物的出口前符合性验证（PVoC）符合性证书核实。若器具含有无线功能（如用于智能家居的Wi-Fi或蓝牙），其无线模块还须取得坦桑尼亚通信管理局（TCRA）的型号核准。CISPR 14-1涵盖与压缩机电动机及现代变频压缩机开关电子设备相关的传导与辐射骚扰限值。
summary.zht: 進入坦尚尼亞的家用製冷器具須符合坦尚尼亞標準局（TBS）採用的電磁相容標準，即採用IEC/CISPR 14系列的坦尚尼亞標準（TZS）——適用於家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的CISPR 14-1（發射）和CISPR 14-2（抗擾度）。電磁相容符合性與電氣安全一併在TBS強制計畫下驗證，對進口貨物則通過每批受管制貨物的出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）符合性證書核實。若器具含有無線功能（如用於智慧家居的Wi-Fi或藍牙），其無線模組還須取得坦尚尼亞通信管理局（TCRA）的型號核准。CISPR 14-1涵蓋與壓縮機電動機及現代變頻壓縮機開關電子設備相關的傳導與輻射騷擾限值。

standards_or_laws: TZS adopting CISPR 14-1 (IEC) — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission
TZS adopting CISPR 14-2 (IEC) — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard
TBS PVoC programme — EMC verified together with safety; Certificate of Conformity per regulated consignment
Tanzania Communications Regulatory Authority (TCRA) type approval — required for any embedded radio module (Wi-Fi / Bluetooth)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are governed primarily by GB 4343.1-2018 (emission; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015), with GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) for harmonic emissions. These are enforced under the CCC regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because both the Chinese GB and the Tanzanian TZS standards derive from the same IEC/CISPR 14 family, the technical limits and test methods are closely aligned. However, a Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC test report is not automatically accepted as the basis for Tanzanian market entry — it must be channelled through the TBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity process.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（发射；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015），谐波发射方面依据GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）。上述标准在市场监管总局/认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC制度下执行。由于中国GB与坦桑尼亚TZS标准均源自同一IEC/CISPR 14体系，技术限值与测试方法高度一致。但中国GB 4343.1的CCC检测报告不被自动接受作为坦桑尼亚市场准入依据——须通过TBS PVoC符合性证书流程办理。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（發射；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015），諧波發射方面依據GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）。上述標準在市場監管總局/認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC制度下執行。由於中國GB與坦尚尼亞TZS標準均源自同一IEC/CISPR 14體系，技術限值與測試方法高度一致。但中國GB 4343.1的CCC檢測報告不被自動接受作為坦尚尼亞市場准入依據——須通過TBS PVoC符合性證書流程辦理。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions ≤ 16 A/phase (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: Because GB 4343.1 (CISPR 14-1:2016 basis) and the Tanzanian TZS (CISPR 14 basis) come from the same IEC family, the technical EMC content is closely aligned and the gap is largely procedural: (1) Conformity route — Tanzania does not accept a stand-alone Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC report; EMC must be covered within the TBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity for the consignment, typically supported by an IEC/CISPR 14-based test report from a recognised laboratory. (2) Edition alignment — confirm the specific CISPR 14-1 edition referenced by the applicable TZS, since later CISPR editions add coverage for switched-mode supplies and inverter compressors that an older GB report may not fully address. (3) Radio module — any embedded Wi-Fi/Bluetooth radio additionally needs TCRA type approval, which is a separate channel from the TBS appliance EMC conformity. Tanzania does not operate an EU-style stand-alone EMC Directive; EMC is handled inside the TBS standards-conformity / PVoC framework.
gap.zh: 由于GB 4343.1（CISPR 14-1:2016基准）与坦桑尼亚TZS（CISPR 14基准）源自同一IEC体系，电磁兼容技术内容高度一致，差距主要是程序性的：（1）符合性路径——坦桑尼亚不接受单独的中国GB 4343.1 CCC报告；电磁兼容须纳入该批货物的TBS PVoC符合性证书，通常以认可实验室出具的IEC/CISPR 14基准检测报告为支撑。（2）版本对齐——须确认适用TZS所引用的具体CISPR 14-1版本，因为较新的CISPR版本增加了对开关电源和变频压缩机的覆盖，旧版GB报告可能未充分涵盖。（3）无线模块——任何内置的Wi-Fi/蓝牙无线模块还须取得TCRA型号核准，该渠道独立于TBS器具电磁兼容符合性。坦桑尼亚不设欧盟式独立EMC指令；电磁兼容在TBS标准符合性/PVoC框架内处理。
gap.zht: 由於GB 4343.1（CISPR 14-1:2016基準）與坦尚尼亞TZS（CISPR 14基準）源自同一IEC體系，電磁相容技術內容高度一致，差距主要是程序性的：（1）符合性路徑——坦尚尼亞不接受單獨的中國GB 4343.1 CCC報告；電磁相容須納入該批貨物的TBS PVoC符合性證書，通常以認可實驗室出具的IEC/CISPR 14基準檢測報告為支撐。（2）版本對齊——須確認適用TZS所引用的具體CISPR 14-1版本，因為較新的CISPR版本增加了對開關電源和變頻壓縮機的覆蓋，舊版GB報告可能未充分涵蓋。（3）無線模組——任何內置的Wi-Fi/藍牙無線模組還須取得TCRA型號核准，該渠道獨立於TBS器具電磁相容符合性。坦尚尼亞不設歐盟式獨立EMC指令；電磁相容在TBS標準符合性/PVoC框架內處理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory within the TBS conformity framework — EMC (TZS adopting CISPR 14) is verified together with safety under the PVoC Certificate of Conformity; TCRA type approval additionally mandatory for any embedded radio module
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC for household refrigerators in Tanzania is handled inside the TBS standards-conformity / PVoC framework using a TZS adopting the IEC/CISPR 14 series, not a stand-alone EU-style EMC Directive. Because GB 4343.1 and the Tanzanian TZS share the CISPR 14 base, the technical gap is small, but a Chinese CCC EMC report is not accepted on its own — EMC must be covered within the PVoC Certificate of Conformity, and any embedded radio module needs separate TCRA type approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 坦桑尼亚家用电冰箱的电磁兼容在TBS标准符合性/PVoC框架内处理，采用引用IEC/CISPR 14系列的TZS标准，而非欧盟式独立EMC指令。由于GB 4343.1与坦桑尼亚TZS共享CISPR 14基础，技术差距较小，但中国CCC电磁兼容报告本身不被接受——电磁兼容须纳入PVoC符合性证书，任何内置无线模块须另行取得TCRA型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 坦尚尼亞家用電冰箱的電磁相容在TBS標準符合性/PVoC框架內處理，採用引用IEC/CISPR 14系列的TZS標準，而非歐盟式獨立EMC指令。由於GB 4343.1與坦尚尼亞TZS共享CISPR 14基礎，技術差距較小，但中國CCC電磁相容報告本身不被接受——電磁相容須納入PVoC符合性證書，任何內置無線模組須另行取得TCRA型號核准。
